subtitle: AI Marketing Assistant

description.short: Your AI-powered social media marketing assistant. Create, schedule, and analyze content across all platforms.
description.full:
PostPal is your intelligent marketing companion that helps you grow your social media presence with AI-powered content creation, smart scheduling, and comprehensive analytics.

KEY FEATURES:

• AI Content Generation - Create engaging posts with AI assistance. Choose your tone, add keywords, and let PostPal craft the perfect message for each platform.

• Smart Scheduling - Plan your content calendar with ease. Schedule posts for optimal times and manage your entire content pipeline from one place.

• Multi-Platform Support - Connect Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, and YouTube. Manage all your social accounts in one unified dashboard.

• Content Approval Workflow - Review AI-generated content before publishing. Approve, edit, or reject posts with a simple swipe.

• Analytics & Insights - Track your performance with detailed analytics. Monitor engagement, follower growth, and content performance across all platforms.

• Hashtag Suggestions - Get AI-powered hashtag recommendations to maximize your reach and engagement.

• Platform Previews - See exactly how your posts will look on each platform before publishing.

• Recurring Templates - Set up recurring content schedules for consistent posting.

• Push Notifications - Get reminders before scheduled posts go live.

Whether you're a small business owner, content creator, or marketing professional, PostPal helps you save time and grow your audience with intelligent automation.

releaseNotes:
